---
title: "Model Context Protocol (MCP)"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Model Context Protocol (MCP)

## Qu'est-ce que MCP ?

MCP est un **standard ouvert** (publié par Anthropic, novembre 2024) pour connecter les LLMs à des sources de données et outils externes. Il standardise l'interface entre les agents IA et les ressources externes.

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    subgraph "MCP Architecture"
        HOST["MCP Host<br/>Claude Code, Cline"] -->|MCP Protocol| CLIENT[MCP Client]
        CLIENT -->|stdio/SSE| SERVER1["MCP Server<br/>Filesystem"]
        CLIENT -->|stdio/SSE| SERVER2["MCP Server<br/>PostgreSQL"]
        CLIENT -->|stdio/SSE| SERVER3["MCP Server<br/>GitHub API"]
    end
    
    style HOST fill:#1b5e20,color:#fff
    style CLIENT fill:#1565c0,color:#fff
```

## Primitives MCP

| Primitive | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| **Tools** | Action | Fonctions exécutables (query DB, search, compute) |
| **Resources** | Données | Données lisibles (files, DB schemas, configs) |
| **Prompts** | Template | Templates de prompts réutilisables |

## Transport

| Transport | Description | Cas d'usage |
|-----------|-------------|------------|
| **stdio** | Communication via stdin/stdout | Local (même machine) |
| **SSE** | Server-Sent Events | Remote, HTTP-based |
| **Streamable HTTP** | HTTP bidirectionnel | Remote, production |

## MCP Servers populaires

| Server | Fonction | Repo |
|--------|----------|------|
| Filesystem | Accès fichiers | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem` |
| PostgreSQL | Query DB | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres` |
| GitHub | Issues, PRs, repos | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-github` |
| Brave Search | Web search | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-brave-search` |
| Memory | KV store persistant | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-memory` |
| Puppeteer | Browser automation | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-puppeteer` |
| Slack | Messages, channels | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-slack` |
| Google Drive | Docs, sheets | `@modelcontextprotocol/server-google-drive` |

## Écrire un MCP Server

### Python (FastMCP)

```python
from mcp.server import Server
from mcp.types import Tool, TextContent

server = Server("my-tools")

@server.list_tools()
async def list_tools():
    return [Tool(
        name="get_weather",
        description="Get weather for a city",
        inputSchema={
            "type": "object",
            "properties": {"city": {"type": "string"}},
            "required": ["city"]
        }
    )]

@server.call_tool()
async def call_tool(name, arguments):
    if name == "get_weather":
        city = arguments["city"]
        # ... fetch weather ...
        return [TextContent(type="text", text=f"Weather in {city}: 22°C")]
```

### Configuration dans Claude Code

```json
// ~/.claude/claude_desktop_config.json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "filesystem": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "/path/to/dir"]
    },
    "postgres": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres"],
      "env": {"DATABASE_URL": "postgresql://..."}
    }
  }
}
```

## Adoption

| Client | MCP Support | Version min |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| Claude Code | ✅ Natif | v1.0 |
| Cline | ✅ Natif | v3.0 |
| Goose | ✅ Natif | v1.0 |
| Cursor | ✅ | v0.42 |
| Continue.dev | ✅ | v0.9 |
| Windsurf | ✅ | Récent |
| Zed | ✅ | v0.165 |

::: callout-tip
## MCP comme standard universel
MCP devient le **standard de facto** pour connecter les agents IA aux outils externes. Un MCP server écrit une fois fonctionne avec tous les clients MCP. Équivalent de ce que LSP a été pour les IDE.
:::

## MCP Servers découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_MCP_START -->
### [n8n](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n)
Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

⭐ 197.1k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `ai`, `apis`, `automation`, `cli`, `data-flow`, `development`, `integration-framework`, `integrations`

### [gemini-cli](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli)
An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

⭐ 106.1k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agents`, `cli`, `gemini`, `gemini-api`, `mcp-client`, `mcp-server`

### [Scrapling](https://github.com/D4Vinci/Scrapling)
🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

⭐ 70.2k | `Python` | Licence: BSD-3-Clause | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-scraping`, `automation`, `crawler`, `crawling`, `crawling-python`, `data`, `data-extraction`

### [worldmonitor](https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor)
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

⭐ 62.0k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `dashboard`, `geopolitics`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `monitoring`, `news`

### [chrome-devtools-mcp](https://github.com/ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp)
Chrome DevTools for coding agents

⭐ 47.2k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `browser`, `chrome`, `chrome-devtools`, `debugging`, `devtools`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `puppeteer`

### [mindsdb/mindsdb](https://github.com/mindsdb/mindsdb)
Connect and unify data across various platforms and databases with MindsDB as a single MCP server.

⭐ 39.5k | `Makefile` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai`, `anton`, `artificial-inteligence`, `claude`, `claude-cowork`, `codex`, `cowork`

### [UI-TARS-desktop](https://github.com/bytedance/UI-TARS-desktop)
The Open-Source Multimodal AI Agent Stack: Connecting Cutting-Edge AI Models and Agent Infra

⭐ 38.1k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `agent`, `agent-tars`, `browser-use`, `computer-use`, `cowork`, `gui-agent`, `gui-operator`, `mcp`

### [microsoft/playwright-mcp](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright-mcp)
Official Microsoft Playwright MCP server, enabling LLMs to interact with web pages through structured accessibility snapshots

⭐ 35.3k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `mcp`, `playwright`

### [github-mcp-server](https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server)
GitHub's official MCP Server

⭐ 31.6k | `Go` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `github`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`

### [gpt-researcher](https://github.com/assafelovic/gpt-researcher)
An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers

⭐ 28.4k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `automation`, `deepresearch`, `llms`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `python`

### [eyaltoledano/claude-task-master](https://github.com/eyaltoledano/claude-task-master)
📇 ☁️ 🏠 - AI-powered task management system for AI-driven development. Features PRD parsing, task expansion, multi-provider support (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Perplexity, xAI), and selective tool load...

⭐ 27.9k | `JavaScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `ai`, `cursor`, `cursor-ai`, `cursorai`, `lovable`, `lovable-dev`, `roocode`, `task-manager`

### [FastMCP](https://github.com/jlowin/fastmcp)
🐍 - A high-level framework for building MCP servers in Python

⭐ 26.3k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `agents`, `fastmcp`, `llms`, `mcp`, `mcp-clients`, `mcp-servers`, `mcp-tools`, `model-context-protocol`

### [ahujasid/blender-mcp](https://github.com/ahujasid/blender-mcp)
🐍 - MCP server for working with Blender

⭐ 24.5k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19

### [Python MCP SDK](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk)
The official Python SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients

⭐ 23.7k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19

### [n8n-mcp](https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp)
A MCP for Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Windsurf / Cursor to build n8n workflows for you

⭐ 22.3k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `n8n`, `workflows`

### [GLips/Figma-Context-MCP](https://github.com/GLips/Figma-Context-MCP)
📇 🏠 - Provide coding agents direct access to Figma data to help them one-shot design implementation.

⭐ 15.4k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `ai`, `cursor`, `figma`, `mcp`, `typescript`

### [skill-seekers/Skill_Seekers](https://github.com/yusufkaraaslan/Skill_Seekers)
!yusufkaraaslan/Skill_Seekers MCP server 🐍 🏠 🍎 🪟 🐧 - Transform 17 source types (docs, GitHub repos, PDFs, videos, Jupyter, Confluence, Notion, Slack/Discord) into AI-ready skills and RAG knowledge....

⭐ 14.5k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `ai-tools`, `ast-parser`, `automation`, `claude-ai`, `claude-skills`, `code-analysis`, `conflict-detection`, `documentation`

### [TypeScript MCP SDK](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk)
The official TypeScript SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients

⭐ 12.9k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-19

### [mrexodia/ida-pro-mcp](https://github.com/mrexodia/ida-pro-mcp)
🐍 🏠 - MCP server for IDA Pro, allowing you to perform binary analysis with AI assistants. This plugin implement decompilation, disassembly and allows you to generate malware analysis reports automa...

⭐ 10.5k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `ai`, `aiagent`, `binary-analysis`, `ida-plugin`, `ida-pro`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `modelcontextprotocol`

### [LaurieWired/GhidraMCP](https://github.com/LaurieWired/GhidraMCP)
☕ 🏠 - A Model Context Protocol server for Ghidra that enables LLMs to autonomously reverse engineer applications. Provides tools for decompiling binaries, renaming methods and data, and listing met...

⭐ 9.5k | `Java` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19

### [awslabs/mcp](https://github.com/awslabs/mcp)
🎖️ ☁️ - AWS MCP servers for seamless integration with AWS services and resources.

⭐ 9.5k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `aws`, `mcp`, `mcp-client`, `mcp-clients`, `mcp-host`, `mcp-server`, `mcp-servers`, `mcp-tools`

### [wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP](https://github.com/wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP)
📇 🏠 🍎 🪟 🐧 - A swiss-army-knife that can manage/execute programs and read/write/search/edit code and text files.

⭐ 8.6k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `code-analysis`, `code-generation`, `gemini-cli-extension`, `mcp`, `terminal-ai`, `terminal-automation`

### [firecrawl/firecrawl-mcp-server](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl-mcp-server)
!firecrawl/firecrawl-mcp-server MCP server 🎖️ 📇 ☁️ 🏠 - Official Firecrawl server with live browser interaction (firecrawl_interact) — navigate, click, type, and scroll on a page before extraction, ...

⭐ 7.0k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `batch-processing`, `claude`, `content-extraction`, `data-collection`, `firecrawl`, `firecrawl-ai`, `javascript-rendering`, `llm-tools`

### [browsermcp/mcp](https://github.com/browsermcp/mcp)
📇 🏠 - Automate your local Chrome browser

⭐ 6.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `browser-automation`, `browser-extension`, `claude`, `cursor`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`

### [lharries/whatsapp-mcp](https://github.com/lharries/whatsapp-mcp)
🐍 🏎️ - An MCP server for searching your personal WhatsApp messages, contacts and sending messages to individuals or groups

⭐ 5.9k | `Go` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `ai`, `mcp`, `whatsapp`, `whatsapp-api`

### [awesome-mcp-servers](https://github.com/appcypher/awesome-mcp-servers)
Awesome MCP Servers - A curated list of Model Context Protocol servers

⭐ 5.7k | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `ai`, `anthropic-claude`, `awesome`, `context`, `mcp`, `model-context-protocol`, `servers`, `tool-use`

### [sooperset/mcp-atlassian](https://github.com/sooperset/mcp-atlassian)
🐍 ☁️ - MCP server for Atlassian products (Confluence and Jira). Supports Confluence Cloud, Jira Cloud, and Jira Server/Data Center. Provides comprehensive tools for searching, reading, creating, an...

⭐ 5.6k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `atlassian`, `confluence`, `jira`, `mcp`

### [executeautomation/playwright-mcp-server](https://github.com/executeautomation/mcp-playwright)
📇 - An MCP server using Playwright for browser automation and webscrapping

⭐ 5.6k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19

### [mobile-next/mobile-mcp](https://github.com/mobile-next/mobile-mcp)
📇 🏠 🐧 🍎 - MCP Server for Android/iOS application and device automation, development and app scraping. Simulator/Emulator/Physical devices like iPhone, Google Pixel, Samsung supported.

⭐ 5.5k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `agent`, `android`, `emulator`, `ios`, `mcp`, `mobile`, `physical`, `real`

### [21st-dev/Magic-MCP](https://github.com/21st-dev/magic-mcp)
Create crafted UI components inspired by the best 21st.dev design engineers.

⭐ 5.5k | `TypeScript` | MAJ: 2026-07-19

<!-- TOOLS_MCP_END -->
